# PHIL.163 ? Winner-Take-Most Markets

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** competitive_strategy
**Subcategory:** winner_take_most_markets
**Domain:** COMPETITIVE_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
In many markets, #1 captures disproportionate value

## Application
Race to dominance, invest aggressively in leadership, avoid being #3 or worse
